# Chieftain of the North ◆

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Tactics

*Title.*

---

Attach to a **_Ranger_** hero or Aragorn. Attached character gains the **_Warrior_** trait.
**Action**: Exhaust Chieftain of the North to choose an attacking ally that shares a **_Trait_** with the attached character. Either ready that ally or give it +1 ATK for that attack.

---

> *“Here is Aragorn son of Arathorn, chieftain of the Dúnedain…” —Faramir, The Return of the King*

**Pack:** [[ALeP - Blood in the Isen]] #189
